427:     const order = await this.getOrder(orderId);

435:     let kitchenItems = (order.items as any[]).map(item => ({
436:       name: item.name,

438:       notes: item.notes || null,

443:       const existingItems = existing.items as any[];
444:       // Map existing items by name for lookup

453:             ...newItem,
454:             cookingStatus: existingItem.cookingStatus
455:           };
456:         }

458:         return newItem;
